title: GOTT Snapshot report 2024 to 2025
body: "This report covers:   highlights of GOTT’s work over the year 2024/2025 how GOTT has helped to develop Knowledge Asset commercialisation capability how GOTT has helped to accelerate Knowledge Asset commercialisation public sector case studies   If you have any queries about this report, please email the Government Office for Technology Transfer (GOTT) at GOTT@dsit.gov.uk.  "
